시편 93:1.content: Yahweh reigns! He is clothed with majesty! Yahweh is armed with strength. The world also is established. It can’t be moved.

시편 93:2.content: Your throne is established from long ago. You are from everlasting.

시편 93:3.content: The floods have lifted up, Yahweh, the floods have lifted up their voice. The floods lift up their waves.

시편 93:4.content: Above the voices of many waters, the mighty breakers of the sea, Yahweh on high is mighty.

시편 93:5.content: Your statutes stand firm. Holiness adorns your house, Yahweh, forever more.
